channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Java (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Java nel periodo monthly.

item.title: ☕ iflytek/skillhub (2388 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: iflytek

📝 Repository: iflytek/skillhub

📄 Descrizione: Self-hosted, open-source agent skill registry for enterprises. Publish & version skill packages, govern with RBAC and audit logs, deploy on-premise with Docker or Kubernetes.

⭐ Stelle: 2388

🍴 Forks: 282

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: iflytek-astron openclaw openclaw-skills skill skill-hub skill-manager skills

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-11T12:17:05Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-09T04:28:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System- (95 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shanqiu127

📝 Repository: shanqiu127/Warehouse-Management-System-

📄 Descrizione: 企业级仓库管理系统。项目采用前后端分离架构，前端基于 Vue 3 + Vite，后端基于 Spring Boot + MyBatis-Plus，数据库使用 MySQL。系统围绕实际仓储业务场景，完成了用户与权限管理、基础资料维护、进销退存流程、统计分析与可视化展示，具备完整的开发、部署与演示能力。

⭐ Stelle: 95

🍴 Forks: 12

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: warehouse-management-system wms

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-18T14:11:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-15T21:47:05Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

💻 Linguaggio: Java

item.title: ☕ xiaowuDev/Bluetooth-headset-location-software (69 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xiaowuDev

📝 Repository: xiaowuDev/Bluetooth-headset-location-software

📄 Descrizione: 因为本人蓝牙耳机比较小，也没买保护壳，导致蓝牙耳机总是莫名其妙忘记带或者遗落，所以做了一个关于这个蓝牙和耳机的定位扫描器，因为各个厂商其实对于贵的耳机都是能有相应的APP定位的，但是本人的耳机是华为Freeclip2，但是本人手机是小米17Pro。无法找到，所以做了这个App，用于监听蓝牙断开时间，记录断开蓝牙时耳机的最后已知的位置，然后在家以外的地方弹出遗落提醒，回到现场之后可以通过蓝牙做近距离搜索

⭐ Stelle: 69

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T03:56:02Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-08T04:21:52Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java (63 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jaigaresc

📝 Repository: jaigaresc/Poops-PS5-Java

📄 Descrizione: Java implementation of the poops_ps5 sys_netcontrol UAF kernel exploit for PS5 BD-J. Achieves arbitrary kernel R/W, root privileges, enables Debug Settings, and deploys an ELF loader.

⭐ Stelle: 63

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: MIT License

item.title: ☕ shuangshuang-121/naruku (45 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shuangshuang-121

📝 Repository: shuangshuang-121/naruku

📄 Descrizione: narku是一个专门的excl解析工具，可以快速的解析上百万条excl数据和转换成csv的格式，可以和datax、doris配合做数据导入，或者用于数据解析。它在内存方面是安全的，基于poi但是不会出现内存溢出的问题，目前naruku还有数据备份的业务，但是这个业务还没有彻底完善，会在下个版本逐渐完善的。

⭐ Stelle: 45

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: Java

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-01T01:52:31Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-15T19:21:44Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ chawdamrunal/JWTLens (37 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: chawdamrunal

📝 Repository: chawdamrunal/JWTLens

📄 Descrizione: JWTLens - Burp Suite extension for automated JWT security testing. 62 checks: passive scanning, algorithm confusion, signature bypass, KID injection, weak secret brute force, and a built-in JWT Forge tab. Works automatically as you browse.

⭐ Stelle: 37

🍴 Forks: 8

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bug-bounty burp-extensions burpsuite cybersecurity jwt jwt-decode jwt-security jwtlens owasp security-scanner security-tools token-security vulnerability vulnerability-scanners web-security

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-10T09:39:09Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-06T21:59:56Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: ☕ jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine (36 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: jar-analyzer

📝 Repository: jar-analyzer/jar-analyzer-engine

📄 Descrizione: Java bytecode analysis engine built on ASM, extracts method call graphs, inheritance trees, Spring routes, and string constants from JAR/WAR into SQLite. AI-friendly output for security auditing.

⭐ Stelle: 36

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: Java

🏷️ Topics: bytecode call-graph code-audit java-asm java-bytecode static-analysis

📜 Licenza: MIT License

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-10T05:50:06Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
